/usr/bin/c++  -g -Wall -pthread -g CMakeFiles/test_shard_router.dir/tests/unit/test_shard_router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_shard_router.dir/src/common/shard_router.cpp.o -o ../bin/test_shard_router   -L/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
